codeReview.summary: Fix correctly replaces 3 always-true u64 >= 0 assertions with meaningful > 0 assertions in prompt_integration_tests.rs. The semantic change from 'duration >= 0' to 'duration > 0' is appropriate since it verifies validation actually takes non-zero time. No other always-true assertions remain in the crate.

summary: All 3 always-true assertions (lines 109, 201, 660 in test_validate_task_completion_success_path, test_validate_task_completion_failure_path, and test_full_pipeline_integration respectively) were correctly replaced with > 0 assertions on total_duration_ms. cargo clippy passes with no warnings and all 12 tests pass. No other u64 >= 0 patterns remain in the crate.
